name: HRS_GROUP_SPACE_ASSOC
description: This table will hold the relation between application objects like Goals, Appraisals etc with the Group Space. ObjectId will be corresponding to GoalId, AppraisalId etc and ObjectType would be Goals, Appraisal etc.

columns.Name: GROUP_SPACE_ASSOC_ID
columns.Comments: It is the primary key of this table.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Application Object Id is stored as OBJECT_ID. e.g., it can be GOAL_ID

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Application Object Type is stored as OBJECT_TYPE. e.g., it can be GOALS to represent Goals.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: It is used for visually identifying one of the group spaces related to a business object as primary. Primary group space cannot be unlinked from the business object.

columns.Name: GROUP_SPACE_NAME
columns.Comments: This is used for storing WebCenter Group Space name, which is  associated with OBJECT_ID and OBJECT_TYPE.

columns.Name: GROUP_SPACE_GUID
columns.Comments: This is used for storing WebCenter Group Space GUID, which is  associated with OBJECT_ID and OBJECT_TYPE.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
